name: Browse.sh Web Skills Adapter
description: Use this skill when Raul asks Prometheus to look into Browse.sh, Browserbase browse CLI skills, open web catalog skills, or when a browser/web automation task could benefit from importing a site-specific Browse.sh skill. Triggers on: browse.sh, browse CLI, Browserbase skills, web skill catalog, import browse skill, site automation skill, use browse.sh for this site, browse skills add, safe-browser, browserbase skill, and open web catalog. This skill helps Prometheus decide when Browse.sh is useful, how to research/import a matching skill, and how to adapt the skill into Prometheus-native browser automation instead of blindly replacing Prometheus browser tools.

resources.description: Initial Browse.sh and Browserbase Browse CLI overview gathered from browse.sh, Browserbase docs, and browserbase/skills README.

Amazon product search/extraction playbook from Browse.sh, adapted to Prometheus-native browser_extract_structured/browser tools. Triggers: amazon, amazon product search, search Amazon, Amazon toothbrush, Amazon products, Amazon scraping, product card extraction, shopping search.
Design note recommending first-class trigger metadata and auto-injection for skill resources/templates/examples.
How to convert Browse.sh shopping/product extraction knowledge into Prometheus product carousels.
